timeLock.shortExplanationDetail: Even if there's unauthorized access, 24 hours gives you time to detect and respond.
timeLock.modalIntro: Time Lock is a critical security feature that protects your assets.
timeLock.protection1: Unauthorized access detection: Even if someone steals your private key and tries to unlock, 24 hours gives you time to notice and respond
timeLock.protection2: Phishing protection: Even if you accidentally sign something, you have 24 hours before assets actually move
timeLock.protection3: Hacking protection: Attackers cannot withdraw assets within 24 hours
timeLock.waitingTitle: What you can do during the wait
timeLock.waiting3: Use Emergency Unlock if needed (7-day wait + Bond required)
timeLock.tipsContent: The combination of quantum-resistant cryptography and Time Lock is the most effective security strategy against 'harvest now, decrypt later' attacks.

meta.title: Quantum Shield - Protect Your Assets with Quantum-Resistant Cryptography
meta.description: The world's first quantum-resistant cryptographic bridge combining Dilithium-III and ZK-STARKs. Protect your assets today from tomorrow's threats.

hero.subtitle: Protect your ETH and tokens from future quantum computer attacks. Secure your assets with NIST-certified next-generation cryptography. Get started in 3 simple steps.

dilithium.title: Dilithium-III Cryptography
dilithium.description: NIST-certified lattice-based digital signatures. Next-generation cryptography that is mathematically resistant to quantum computers.
dilithium.tooltip: Dilithium is a digital signature algorithm that is secure against quantum computers. It was standardized by NIST in 2024.

timeLock.title: Time Lock Protection
timeLock.description: 24-hour security waiting period. A temporal buffer to detect and prevent unauthorized access.
timeLock.tooltip: Time Lock provides a 24-hour waiting period before asset withdrawal. This allows time to detect and prevent fraud.

zkStark.title: ZK-STARK Verification
zkStark.description: Transparency and verifiability through zero-knowledge proofs. Achieves scalability while maintaining quantum resistance.
zkStark.tooltip: ZK-STARKs allow proving validity without revealing information. They are also resistant to quantum computers.

selfCustody.title: Self-Custody
selfCustody.description: You alone control your assets. Private keys are generated and stored locally, never sent to servers.
selfCustody.tooltip: Self-custody means managing your own assets without relying on third parties.

emergency.title: Emergency Recovery
emergency.description: Peace of mind even if you lose your private key. A safety net to recover assets with a 7-day wait and bond.
emergency.tooltip: Emergency recovery allows you to recover assets by depositing collateral, even if you lose your private key.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: All transactions are verifiable on-chain. Open-source, audited smart contracts.

step1.title: Generate Keys
step1.description: Connect your wallet and generate a Dilithium key pair. The private key is stored only on your device.

step2.title: Lock Assets
step2.description: Lock ETH or ERC-20 tokens in the quantum-resistant vault. Cannot be withdrawn without Dilithium signature.

step3.title: Unlock Safely
step3.description: Request unlock with Dilithium signature. After 24-hour Time Lock, assets safely return to your wallet.

cta.title: Prepare for the Quantum Era
cta.description: Protect your assets from 'harvest now, decrypt later' attacks. Start preparing today for tomorrow's threats.

brand.description: Digital asset protection for the quantum computing era. Safeguarding your assets from future threats with NIST-certified cryptography.

meta.title: FAQ | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Frequently asked questions about Quantum Shield

whatIsQs.question: What is Quantum Shield?
whatIsQs.answer: Quantum Shield is a next-generation security platform that protects your digital assets from quantum computers. Using the NIST-certified Dilithium-III cryptographic algorithm, it securely protects your assets against future quantum attacks.

whyQuantum.question: Why is quantum resistance important?
whyQuantum.answer: The ECDSA currently used in cryptocurrencies could be broken by a sufficiently powerful quantum computer. Using quantum-resistant cryptography now is essential to protect your assets from 'harvest now, decrypt later' attacks.

whatIsLock.question: What is Lock?
whatIsLock.answer: Lock is the operation of depositing your assets into Quantum Shield's quantum-resistant vault. Locked assets cannot be withdrawn without a Dilithium signature.

why24h.question: Why does Unlock take 24 hours?
why24h.answer: The 24-hour Time Lock is a security feature to detect and prevent unauthorized unlock requests. If there's an issue during this period, a Challenge can prevent the unauthorized unlock.

whatIsEmergency.question: What is Emergency Unlock?
whatIsEmergency.answer: Emergency Unlock is a safety net for when you lose your Dilithium private key. It requires a 7-day waiting period and a Bond (collateral), but allows you to recover your assets with only a wallet signature.

lostKey.question: What should I do if I lose my secret key?
lostKey.answer: Use the Emergency Unlock feature. Pay a Bond (collateral) and after a 7-day waiting period, you can recover your assets. The Bond is returned if the unlock is legitimate.

hero.title: Quantum-Resistant Cryptography
hero.subtitle: Protecting assets from future quantum computer attacks

dilithium.title: Dilithium-III
dilithium.description: NIST-certified lattice-based digital signature algorithm. Used for user asset lock/unlock. Mathematically difficult to break even with quantum computers.

sphincs.title: SPHINCS+
sphincs.description: Hash-based digital signatures. Used for Prover (approver) signatures. Enables multi-layer defense with different mathematical foundations.

zkstark.title: ZK-STARK
zkstark.description: Zero-knowledge proof technology. Enables third-party verification of transaction validity. Achieves scalability while maintaining quantum resistance.

meta.title: Emergency Unlock - Bond | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Confirm the Bond required for Emergency Unlock

warning.title: Emergency Unlock requires a 7-day waiting period
warning.message: and a Bond (collateral). If Normal Unlock is available, we recommend using that instead.

bondCard.title: About Bond (Collateral)
bondCard.info1: Bond is fully refunded after the 7-day waiting period if there is no Challenge
bondCard.info2: In case of fraudulent Unlock, Bond is forfeited to the Challenger
bondCard.info3: Emergency Unlock is a safety net for lost private keys

message.wait: This process may take a few minutes
message.doNotClose: Please do not close the browser

success.title: Emergency Unlock Started
success.subtitle: After the 7-day waiting period, assets will be transferred to your wallet

info.message: If there are no issues during the 7-day Challenge period, your Bond will be automatically refunded. You can complete the unlock from the dashboard when available.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of Quantum Shield ("Service"). By using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

service.title: 2. Service Description
service.content: The Service provides digital asset protection using quantum-resistant cryptography. You use the Service at your own risk and responsibility.

eligibility.title: 3. Eligibility
eligibility.content: The Service is available only to individuals 18 years or older, or legal entities. Access from certain countries or regions may be restricted.

risks.title: 4. Risks
risks.content: Cryptocurrency prices are volatile and you may lose your principal. The Service does not provide investment advice. You are responsible for your own decisions.

keys.title: 5. Private Key Management
keys.content: You are responsible for securely managing your Dilithium private key. We are not liable for any losses resulting from lost or compromised private keys.

prohibited.title: 6. Prohibited Activities
prohibited.content: Using the Service for unauthorized access, money laundering, terrorist financing, or any other illegal activities is prohibited.

disclaimer.title: 7. Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The Service is provided "as is" without any warranties, express or implied. We are not liable for any damages resulting from smart contract vulnerabilities, network failures, or other technical issues.

changes.title: 8. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may modify these Terms as necessary. Significant changes will be notified through the Service.

governing.title: 9. Governing Law
governing.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of Japan. The Tokyo District Court shall have exclusive jurisdiction.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For inquiries regarding these Terms, please contact support@quantumshield.io

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: Quantum Shield ("we") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information. This policy explains the information we collect, use, and protect.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We may collect the following information:

notCollected.title: Information We Don't Collect
notCollected.content: We do not collect or store:

items.personal: Personal identifying information (name, address, phone number, etc.)

usage.title: Use of Information
usage.content: Collected information is used only for providing and improving the Service, enhancing security, and user support.

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not share your information with third parties except as required by law. Please note that blockchain transactions are public information.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We use cookies to improve Service functionality. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but some features may be limited.

security.title: Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect user information. However, we cannot guarantee complete security on the internet.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, and delete your information. Please contact support@quantumshield.io for requests.

changes.title: Policy Changes
changes.content: We may modify this policy as necessary. Significant changes will be notified through the Service.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For privacy inquiries, please contact privacy@quantumshield.io

meta.title: Get Started - Quantum Shield

step1.title: Connect Wallet
step1.description: Connect your wallet. We support MetaMask and other EVM-compatible wallets.

step2.title: Generate Dilithium Keys
step2.description: Generate quantum-resistant Dilithium key pairs. These keys are stored only on your device and never sent to servers.
step2.dilithiumTooltip: Dilithium is a quantum-resistant digital signature algorithm officially adopted by NIST in 2024. It uses lattice-based cryptography that is difficult to break even with quantum computers.

selfCustodyNotice.title: Only You Hold the Keys
selfCustodyNotice.description: Your private keys are stored only on your device. They are never sent to Quantum Shield servers, so no one else can access them. Be sure to create a backup and store it safely.

keyGeneration.idle: Click the button to start generation

step3.title: Backup Your Keys
step3.description: Back up your private keys in a safe location.

warning.title: Important: Keep your private keys safe
warning.description: Losing your private keys may result in difficulty accessing your assets. Always create a backup.

checklist.downloaded: I have downloaded the backup file
checklist.saved: I have saved the file to a secure location (USB drive, external HDD, printed on paper for offline storage). I avoid cloud storage and understand that losing this file may make my assets inaccessible.

step4.title: Ready to Go!
step4.description: Quantum Shield setup is complete. You can now use quantum-resistant protection.
